user.title: Nomos Energy
user.description: Enter your Nomos API client credentials. Contact Nomos support (e.g. svea-solar@nomos.energy for Svea Solar customers) to obtain a client ID and secret.

data_description.client_id: OAuth2 client ID issued by Nomos
data_description.client_secret: OAuth2 client secret issued by Nomos

subscription.title: Select Subscription
subscription.description: Multiple subscriptions found on this account. Select the one you want to integrate.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Nomos API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_credentials: Invalid client ID or client secret.
error.no_subscriptions: No subscriptions found for this account.

abort.already_configured: This Nomos subscription is already configured.

submit_meter_reading.name: Submit Meter Reading
submit_meter_reading.description: Submit an analog meter reading for a Nomos subscription.

value.name: Reading Value
value.description: The current cumulative meter value in kWh.

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the meter reading (e.g. 2024-03-14T12:00:00+00:00).
